keyPoints: Transparency is crucial for accountability and trust in AI systems
Algorithmic fairness and bias must be evaluated and addressed
Human oversight and review are necessary to prevent errors and harm
Explainability and interpretability are key to understanding AI decision-making
Accountability and liability must be established for AI system developers and users
Human-centered design principles can guide the development of AI for social good
Regulatory frameworks and standards must be established to govern AI development and use
